mapper.insert: INSERT INTO seat (performance_id, section, seat_row, seat_number, grade, price) VALUES (#{performanceId}, #{section}, #{seatRow}, #{seatNumber}, #{grade}, #{price})

INSERT INTO seat (performance_id, section, seat_row, seat_number, grade, price) VALUES
(#{s.performanceId}, #{s.section}, #{s.seatRow}, #{s.seatNumber}, #{s.grade}, #{s.price})
